remarks: Wow!! - Totally renovated studio apartment from top to bottom! - Nearly new kitchen with white shaker style cabinets, stainless steel fridge and quartz counter - Updated bathroom with subway tile shower - Private washer / dryer in unit! - Walk to multiple restaurants & coffee shops in the Wall Street neighborhood - Street parking + off/street parking available in nearby parking lots with paid permit - ** Tenant to pay $150 / month flat fee for all utilities (except for cable / internet) - No pets!!
